channel.title: Course Schedule on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Course Schedule on yexca'Blog

item.title: Import Course Schedule to Calendar (Shuwei Academic System)
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash

Intro

Checking your course schedule on the school’s academic system isn’t convenient. Plus, third-party apps come with security risks and way too many ads. So, I figured I’d import my course schedule directly into a calendar. I went with Outlook Calendar for seamless sync across iOS, Windows, and Android.

Setup

  • A computer
  • An Android phone
  • Chrome browser installed on your computer: Official Link
  • WakeUp Course Schedule app installed on your phone: Official Link

Step One: Export Your Course Schedule

  1. Open the academic system’s website in Chrome and navigate to the course schedule page.
  2. Export the HTML file.

First, copy the following code:
